summary: Iteration 53: Complete testing of Automated Scheduled Reconciliation Reports feature. Backend: 20/20 tests passed for all 5 endpoints (GET /api/reconciliation-alerts/settings, PUT /api/reconciliation-alerts/settings, POST /api/reconciliation-alerts/run, GET /api/reconciliation-alerts, GET /api/reconciliation-alerts/latest). Frontend: All features verified - Alerts tab with settings card (threshold dropdown with 100/250/500/1000/2500/5000 options, schedule day/hour dropdowns, enabled toggle, channel badges for whatsapp/push/email), Alert History showing flagged/clean status badges with statement summaries and top flagged items, Run Now button triggers alert generation with toast notification.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console: <tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody>. These are display:contents wrapper issues from dynamic rendering but don't affect functionality. Same issue noted in iteration_52.

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/reconciliation-alerts/settings (line 1055-1068 scheduler.py) - Returns default settings with threshold, enabled, day_of_week, hour, minute, channels. Creates default if not exists.

PUT /api/reconciliation-alerts/settings (line 1009-1051 scheduler.py) - Updates settings, manages APScheduler job creation/removal based on enabled state, returns updated settings with updated_at timestamp.

POST /api/reconciliation-alerts/run (line 979-1006 scheduler.py) - Runs _build_reconciliation_alert function, sends WhatsApp and email notifications, sends push notification to admins if flagged > 0, returns alert object with flagged items.

_build_reconciliation_alert function (line 639-763 scheduler.py) - Queries bank_statements, auto_matches, excludes bank_fees/vat_fees/pos_fees categories, builds flagged_items and statement_summaries, saves to reconciliation_alerts collection.

Frontend ReconciliationPage.jsx Alerts tab (line 561-731) - Uses data-testid attributes correctly, threshold dropdown at data-testid='alert-threshold', Run Now at data-testid='run-alert-btn', toggle at data-testid='alert-toggle', history at data-testid='alert-history-list'.
WhatsApp/Email sending is MOCKED (no Twilio credentials configured) - _send_wa function (line 87-101) and _send_email function (line 104-119) fail silently when credentials not set.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing bank statement (alinma.xls 01/05/2025-31/05/2025) with 786 transactions, 352 unmatched. Multiple alerts generated during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reconciliation Alerts fully tested. Alerts tab at data-testid='alerts-tab'. Alert Settings card with: threshold dropdown at data-testid='alert-threshold' (values: 100,250,500,1000,2500,5000), day dropdown at data-testid='alert-day', hour dropdown at data-testid='alert-hour', toggle at data-testid='alert-toggle', Run Now button at data-testid='run-alert-btn'. Alert history list at data-testid='alert-history-list' with rows at data-testid='alert-row-{idx}'. Channel badges (whatsapp/push/email) are clickable to toggle. Settings auto-save on change. Toast notifications appear for settings save and alert generation. 6 alerts now exist in history with various thresholds (100, 500, 1000).

backend_api_tests.GET /api/reconciliation-alerts/settings: PASS - Returns threshold, enabled, day_of_week, hour, minute, channels
backend_api_tests.POST run returns alert object: PASS - Returns id, total_flagged, total_unmatched, flagged_items, statement_summaries, status, threshold, created_at
backend_api_tests.POST run flagged_items structure: PASS - Contains statement_id, txn_index, date, amount, type
backend_api_tests.POST run statement_summaries structure: PASS - Contains statement_id, file_name, total_txns, matched, unmatched, flagged, match_rate
backend_api_tests.GET alerts structure: PASS - Contains id, created_at, status, total_flagged, total_unmatched, threshold

frontend_alerts_tab.alert_settings_card: PASS - Card with threshold, schedule, enabled, channels
frontend_alerts_tab.top_flagged_items: PASS - Shows date, type badge, amount, description

mocked_apis_list: WhatsApp sending via Twilio - no credentials configured, _send_wa fails silently
Email sending via SMTP - no email_settings configured, _send_email fails silently
